headline: Analysts Positive on Western Digital (WDC) as AI Boosts Memory Demand
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the 10 Best Performing AI Stocks to Buy. headline: Nvidia's AI Reign Under Threat: These 4 Memory Stocks Are Now Leading The Chip Rally
summary: Memory stocks have crushed Nvidia since mid-2025. Here's why SanDisk, Western Digital, Seagate and Micron are now leading the semiconductor rally.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader tech sector are trading higher amid overall market strength in response to growing optimism for continued U.S.-Iran negotiations and sliding energy costs.

headline: Western Digital (WDC) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Data is the fuel that powers AI and it is HDDs that provide the most reliable, scalable and cost-effective data storage solution, playing a vital role in storing the ever-increasing zettabytes of data created by the AI-driven economy.  At Western Digital, we are also leveraging AI internally to enhance productivity and accelerate innovation across our organization.  For example, in engineering, AI is helping to modernize our firmware, enabling us to deliver new features quickly to our customers and in a more cost-effective manner.

raw.headline: Western Digital (WDC) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
raw.summary: Data is the fuel that powers AI and it is HDDs that provide the most reliable, scalable and cost-effective data storage solution, playing a vital role in storing the ever-increasing zettabytes of data created by the AI-driven economy. For example, in engineering, AI is helping to modernize our firmware, enabling us to deliver new features quickly to our customers and in a more cost-effective manner.

headline: Sandisk shares are up 2740% in a year. Evercore sees ’a favorable risk/reward’
summary: Investing.com -- Sandisk shares have surged roughly 2,740% over the past year, but analysts at Evercore ISI believe there is more upside left in one of the hottest stocks on the market.

headline: Hormuz Crisis Triggers Chipmakers' Best Rally Since 2002: 9 Stocks Gaining Up To 60% Since The War Began
summary: Semiconductors are the surprise winners of the Iran war. The SOXX ETF has risen for 10 straight sessions — its longest streak since 2017 — as chipmakers rally up to 60%.

raw.headline: Hormuz Crisis Triggers Chipmakers' Best Rally Since 2002: 9 Stocks Gaining Up To 60% Since The War Began

headline: Wall Street Rebounds From US-Iran War Losses, S&P 500 Turns Positive For 2026 — SanDisk, Lumentum And These Stocks Are Driving Gains In SPY ETF
summary: The S&P 500 Index has rebounded sharply, turning positive for 2026 as easing concerns over the U.S.-Iran conflict lifted investor sentiment and restored confidence in equities. The rally was mirrored by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, with standout gains led by companies such as SanDisk Corporation, Lumentum Holdings, and Ciena Corporation, driven largely by booming demand tied to AI and data infrastructure.
